_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Ki67 (proliferative marker) was expressed in 47% of the population, indicative of their ability to rapidly proliferate
details: Ki67 proliferation marker expressed in 47% of C6 cell population, indicating rapid proliferation ability
